summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. All optical sizing tests in shaping.rs pass — compute_optical_size produces distinct values for different size/DPI combos (VAL-OPSZ-001), auto-opsz produces different coverage at 10px vs 48px with Nunito Sans variable (VAL-OPSZ-002), and fonts without opsz axis are unaffected by auto-opsz (VAL-OPSZ-003).
